creator: george@m5p.com
text:
My experience is in updating (just this last week, still haven't finished) from base system 12.4-RELEASE to 13.2-RELEASE.  As far as I can see, lang/cython does not work at all on 14.2-RELEASE and should be marked BROKEN:

BROKEN_FreeBSD_14=    Does not work of FreeBSD 14; use lang/cython3 instead.

Should this not have been foreseen and an UPDATING entry created?
